_doc: Realistic Vite asset rotation patch. Applied on top of v1/ produces v2 — simulates a typical frontend rebuild where one source file changed (Home.tsx 'Decentralized on Polkadot' → 'Decentralized on Bulletin'), causing Vite to emit a new content-hashed bundle filename and update index.html's script tag. Source: github.com/paritytech/Rock-Paper-Scissors built with vite 7.0.
